channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
What's new in 1.2.0

  • Sidebar navigation — Download / Transcribe / History / Settings in a clean left panel
  • Download queue — add multiple videos, then Download All at once; Add to Queue button lives right in the video card
  • Configurable resolution preset — set 720p, 1080p, 1440p or 4K as your default in Settings
  • Simplified Transcribe workflow — paste URL and click Transcribe directly, no fetch step needed
  • Animated transcription indicator — waveform animation while waiting for results
  • Auto-updates — MindExtract now checks for updates automatically
  • Cleaner UI — neutral grey/white palette, new white icon, Light mode by default
  • First-launch onboarding — guided setup wizard on first open
